title: narcissus × perangustus
intro: Narcissus × perangustus, also known as the narcissus or daffodil, is a hybrid perennial plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family, characterized by its showy trumpet-shaped flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids such as galantamine and lycorine. The health benefits of Narcissus × perangustus include its potential to improve cognitive function, alleviate symptoms of depression and anxiety, and act as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tea or tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
